key_genes: Direct AddConnection + InsertNode + second InsertNode per input-output pair
notes: Synaptogenesis is the critical innovation — gives hidden nodes multi-input connectivity
Deeper starting topology (2 InsertNode genes per path) helps but synaptogenesis matters more
200 BP epochs needed to properly evaluate complex topologies
Low connection cost lets topologies grow before pruning kicks in
Tournament selection outperforms NEAT speciation for this problem size
Modularity Q ~0.33 confirms modular structure is emerging
